description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly dark, hexagonal-patterned exterior. The body is robust and blocky, with a large, rectangular barrel housing that displays a honeycomb-patterned orange vent or heat shield along the side. The grip is sharply angled and integrated into the main body, while the stock is solid and compact, lacking any visible folding or thumbhole features. Small geometric emblems and subtle panel lines add to its modern, tactical appearance. The overall construction suggests a heavy-duty, high-tech weapon suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A futuristic, blocky shotgun with a dark hexagonal-patterned body and a prominent orange honeycomb vent on the side. It has a solid stock and an angular grip, giving it a tactical, high-tech look.
description_view_0: The shotgun is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the angular top surface.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the large orange honeycomb vent, the angular grip, and the geometric emblem on the stock.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the stock and the narrow, rectangular shape of the shotgun's body.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the orange vent, grip, and a geometric emblem on the stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, rectangular housing with visible side venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
